message:
test(tools): add integration coverage for manifest, detection, and robot output

31 tests covering manifest ingestion with golden fixtures, robot mode
output parsing (JSON, JSONL, SARIF, bv triage/next), unavailability
classification, health diagnostics integration with real manifests,
version extraction patterns, auth error detection, and utility route
request validation schemas.

Closes bd-2n73.15

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
